Renotice Of Hearing On Motion To Stay Or Dismiss Proceedings
Off Calendar Feb-25-2020 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Stephen C. Tedesco, Esq. of LITTLER MENDELSON PC, T:415.677.3134, for defendant/moving party;
Seth M. Gerber, Esq. of MORGAN LEWIS, T:310.255.9111, for plaintiff/opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of arguments, the Court adopted its tentative ruling on DEFENDANTS AON RISK SERVICES COMPANIES, INC., AON PLC, AON GROUP, INC.'s Motion To Stay Or Dismiss Proceedings as follows:

Defendants Aon PLC, Aon Group, Inc., and Aon Risk Services Companies, Inc.'s motion to stay or dismiss proceedings is denied.

[See word minutes for the Court's complete ruling.]

Order signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
